queries.question: Show journalist postings and editor postings for English and Spanish languages.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPosting.title 
FROM JobPosting
WHERE (JobPosting.mediaCareer = "Journalist" OR JobPosting.mediaCareer = "Editor") AND JobPosting.languages = "English and Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?jobposting p:mediaCareer ?mediacareer_w .
  ?jobposting p:mediaCareer ?mediacareer_w2 .
  ?jobposting p:languages ?languages_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?mediacareer_w) = "Journalist" || STR(?mediacareer_w2) = "Editor")) && STR(?languages_w) = "English and Spanish"))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT JobPosting.title 
FROM JobPosting
WHERE JobPosting.mediaCareer = "Journalist" OR JobPosting.mediaCareer = "Editor" AND JobPosting.languages = "English and Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?jobposting p:mediaCareer ?mediacareer_w .
  ?jobposting p:mediaCareer ?mediacareer_w2 .

  FILTER((STR(?mediacareer_w) = "Journalist" || (STR(?mediacareer_w2) = "Editor" && STR(?languages_w) = "English and Spanish")))
}
